items.title: More Useful Home Snapshot
items.description: The home dashboard now focuses on active lists, items left to buy, shared lists, and overall progress.

items.title: Cleaner Empty State
items.description: When there are no lists yet, the screen now shows one clear create action instead of repeated buttons.

items.title: Clearer Shopping Context
items.description: The dashboard copy now explains what needs attention instead of repeating generic totals.

items.title: Reduced Visual Noise
items.description: Create-list actions now appear where they are most useful based on whether lists already exist.
